name: Reflected XSS
educational_objective: Understand how unsanitised URL parameters are reflected into HTML responses, enabling script injection that executes in the victim's browser without any persistence.
scenario: AssetManager v2.3 — an internal IT asset inventory tool. The search endpoint at /assets?q= reflects the query string directly into the HTML response inside a <div id='results'> block. No output encoding is applied server-side.
ar_scenario: أداة AssetManager الداخلية تعكس معامل البحث ?q= مباشرةً في استجابة HTML دون أي ترميز للمخرجات.
prerequisites: How browsers parse and execute scripts

hints_metadata.content: The search field reflects exactly what you type back into the page. What happens if your input contains HTML tags?
hints_metadata.ar_content: حقل البحث يعكس ما تكتبه مباشرةً. ماذا يحدث لو كان مدخلك يحتوي على وسوم HTML؟

hints_metadata.content: Try injecting a <script> tag or an event handler attribute like onerror= inside an img tag. The server returns them unmodified.
hints_metadata.ar_content: جرّب حقن وسم <script> أو معالج حدث مثل onerror= داخل وسم img.

hints_metadata.content: Use: — the img src fails, onerror fires immediately. The flag appears in the response when XSS is confirmed.
hints_metadata.ar_content: استخدم: — src تفشل، onerror ينفّذ فوراً.

flag_validation.note: Generated per lab session, validated server-side in xss/lab1 service

hidden_solution_path.exploit_path: GET /assets?q=<img+src%3Dx+onerror%3Dalert(1)> → server reflects unencoded → browser executes onerror handler
hidden_solution_path.fix_summary: HTML-encode all reflected parameters server-side using he.encode() or equivalent
